summary: Iteration 2 end-to-end test. Backend: 34/34 pytest tests pass (18 regression + 16 new). New endpoints all verified: /health & /auth/discord/url now report configured, /catalog/session-types seeds 5 defaults + full CRUD, /catalog/room-types creates and mirrors into /api/rooms, /roblox/user resolves Builderman (id 156) with avatar, /me/roblox/link persists roblox_* fields on user, /players/lookup aggregates real Roblox data + chat/admin/punishments/sessions buckets, /ingest/chatlog and /ingest/adminlog are 401 without secret and 200 with the correct INGEST_SECRET (retrieved from /ingest/info), ingested chat log shows up in /players/lookup, /activity returns unified feed, /permissions now includes sessions.view_active and sessions.view_logs. Frontend: theme toggle cycles dark→light→blurple→dark on <html> classList (fix from iter1 confirmed). Sidebar RobloxIdentityCard shows the linked Roblox username + group rank. Player Search lookup works for Builderman with avatar and all 4 tabs (Chat / Admin / Sessions / Punishments) switching panels. Sessions page loads session-type dropdown, Start session creates an active session, Advance phase increments phase_progress (checkmarks render). Activity page renders. Settings page shows Session Types editor, Room Types editor, Game ingest secret reveal, per-user permission toggles — and adding a new session type via UI works.

issues: React hydration warning logged: '<span> cannot be a child of <option>'. Caused by Emergent dev instrumentation auto-injecting <span> wrappers around the dynamic option label; option still selects and renders. Cosmetic console-only warning, no functional impact.

critical_code_review_comments: Sessions.jsx 'advance' implementation is hacky: it DELETEs the session and POSTs a new doc with the same fields to bump phase_progress. This loses the original id (a new uuid is generated server-side) and is racy if two users hit Advance simultaneously. Better: add a dedicated PUT /api/collections/sessions/{id} or a /sessions/{id}/advance endpoint that atomically updates phase_progress.
POST /catalog/room-types mirrors into legacy db.rooms but PUT/DELETE on room-types does not propagate the rename/removal — Bookings page will show stale rooms.

/api/ingest/info exposes the plaintext ingest secret to anyone with settings.manage perms. Acceptable for an admin reveal, but the secret is also unbounded length and not rotated; consider a 'rotate secret' endpoint.
roblox_user_by_name has no caching; every /players/lookup hits two external Roblox endpoints (~300-800ms). Consider an in-memory TTL cache or persisting roblox lookups to db.roblox_cache.

Hydration warning '<span> cannot be a child of <option>' from Sessions.jsx select options is triggered by the dev instrumentation, but you can suppress by inlining the option label as a single text expression — already done; harmless.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_nexora_api.py (relaxed health and oauth assertions to handle both demo and configured)
/app/backend/tests/test_nexora_iter2.py (new — 16 tests covering catalogs, roblox, players lookup, ingest, activity, new permissions)
test_credentials: Demo owner via POST /api/auth/demo {username:'Nexora Owner', discord_id:'000000000000000000', as_owner:true}. UI: /login -> 'Continue as Demo Owner'. INGEST_SECRET retrieved at runtime via GET /api/ingest/info (owner Bearer token).
seed_data_creation: Backend tests created and deleted TEST_ prefixed docs in session_types, room_types (+ mirrored rooms), chatlogs (message='TEST_lookup_msg' / 'TEST_chat_log_msg'), adminlogs (username='TestPlayer'). UI test added 'TEST_UI_Type' session type — cleaned up after the run via direct mongo delete (delete_many name~/^TEST_/). After cleanup: chatlogs/adminlogs for TestPlayer fully removed; session_types/room_types prefixed with TEST_ removed; mirrored TEST_ rooms removed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Regression suite is now two files: /app/backend/tests/test_nexora_api.py (18 tests) and /app/backend/tests/test_nexora_iter2.py (16 tests). Both are owner-scoped and idempotent — owner_token fixture self-heals perms. test_roblox_user_lookup and test_players_lookup_real_roblox_for_builderman depend on the public Roblox users.roblox.com + thumbnails.roblox.com APIs; if those are flaky, those two tests are the first to fail. Demo owner gets Roblox-linked to Builderman as a side effect of test_roblox_link_me — keep in mind for any later test that expects an unlinked owner. The frontend Sessions 'advance' flow currently DELETEs + recreates the session (id changes) — any future test that captures the session id needs to re-query.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — no bugs found in iteration 2. The iter1 theme toggle bug ('blurple never applied') is now fixed: ThemeContext.jsx cycles through ['dark','light','blurple'] and removes/adds the correct class on document.documentElement, verified by reading document.documentElement.className across 3 toggles ('dark' -> 'light' -> 'blurple' -> 'dark').
